info.title: Kaneo API
info.description: Kaneo Project Management API - Manage projects, tasks, labels, and more

get.description: Get application settings and configuration
Get all projects in a workspace

post.description: Create a new project in a workspace

get.description: Get a specific project by ID
Get all tasks for a specific project

200.description: Project with tasks organized by columns

post.description: Create a new task in a project

get.description: Get a specific task by ID

put.description: Update all fields of a task

get.description: Export all tasks from a project

post.description: Import multiple tasks into a project

put.description: Update only the status of a task
Update only the priority of a task
Assign or unassign a task to a user
Update only the due date of a task
Update only the title of a task
Update only the description of a task

get.description: Get all columns for a project

200.description: List of columns ordered by position

post.description: Create a new column in a project

get.description: Get all activities for a specific task

200.description: List of activities for the task

post.description: Create a new activity (system-generated event)
Create a new comment on a task

get.description: Get all time entries for a specific task

200.description: List of time entries for the task

get.description: Get a specific time entry by ID

post.description: Create a new time entry for a task

get.description: Get all labels assigned to a specific task

200.description: List of labels for the task

get.description: Get all labels for a specific workspace

200.description: List of labels in the workspace

post.description: Create a new label in a workspace

get.description: Get a specific label by ID
Get all notifications for the current user

post.description: Create a new notification for a user

patch.description: Mark a specific notification as read
Mark all notifications as read for the current user

delete.description: Clear all notifications for the current user

get.description: Search across tasks, projects, workspaces, comments, and activities
Get GitHub app configuration information
List all accessible GitHub repositories

post.description: Verify GitHub app installation for a repository

get.description: Get GitHub integration for a project

post.description: Create a new GitHub integration for a project

404.description: Integration not found

delete.description: Delete GitHub integration for a project

post.description: Import GitHub issues as tasks

get.description: Get all external links for a task
Get all workflow rules for a project

put.description: Create or update a workflow rule

get.description: Get all pending invitations for the current user
Get details of a specific invitation by ID

post.description: Create an organization

userId.description: The user id of the organization creator. If not provided, the current user will be used. Should only be used by admins or when called by the server. server-only. Eg: "user-id"

keepCurrentActiveOrganization.description: Whether to keep the current active organization active after creating a new one. Eg: true

400.description: Bad Request. Usually due to missing parameters, or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Due to missing or invalid authentication.

403.description: Forbidden. You do not have permission to access this resource or to perform this action.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource was not found.

429.description: Too Many Requests. You have exceeded the rate limit. Try again later.

500.description: Internal Server Error. This is a problem with the server that you cannot fix.

post.description: Create an invitation to an organization

email.description: The email address of the user to invite

role.description: The role(s) to assign to the user. It can be `admin`, `member`, owner. Eg: "member"

organizationId.description: The organization ID to invite the user to

resend.description: Resend the invitation email, if the user is already invited. Eg: true

post.description: Update the role of a member in an organization

role.description: The new role to be applied. This can be a string or array of strings representing the roles. Eg: ["admin", "sale"]

memberId.description: The member id to apply the role update to. Eg: "member-id"

organizationId.description: An optional organization ID which the member is a part of to apply the role update. If not provided, you must provide session headers to get the active organization. Eg: "organization-id"

post.description: Create a new team within an organization

name.description: The name of the team. Eg: "my-team"

organizationId.description: The organization ID which the team will be created in. Defaults to the active organization. Eg: "organization-id"

id.description: Unique identifier of the created team

organizationId.description: ID of the organization the team belongs to

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the team was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the team was last updated
